examples.title: Rounding to the Nearest Hundred
examples.content:
Round 456 to the nearest hundred.

**Solution:**
1. Target place: hundreds (4)
2. Look at the digit to the right: 5
3. Since 5 ≥ 5, round UP
4. Increase the hundreds digit: $4 + 1 = 5$
5. Change digits to the right to 0

$$456 \rightarrow 500$$

examples.title: Rounding a Decimal to the Nearest Tenth
examples.content:
Round 7.34 to the nearest tenth.

**Solution:**
1. Target place: tenths (3)
2. Look at the digit to the right: 4
3. Since 4 < 5, round DOWN
4. Keep the tenths digit: 3
5. Remove digits to the right

$$7.34 \rightarrow 7.3$$
